mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.college_id, c.name AS college_name, m.name, m.status, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM majors m JOIN colleges c ON m.college_id = c.id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT m.id, m.college_id, c.name AS college_name, m.name, m.status, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM majors m JOIN colleges c ON m.college_id = c.id WHERE c.name = #{collegeName} AND c.status = 1 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.id ASC
SELECT m.id, m.college_id, c.name AS college_name, m.name, m.status, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM majors m JOIN colleges c ON m.college_id = c.id ORDER BY c.id ASC, m.status DESC, m.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO majors (college_id, name, status) VALUES (#{collegeId}, #{name}, #{status})
